title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Oily Hair
description: Aloe barbadensis essential oils contains compounds like aloin, aloe-emodin, and aloe-acerate, which are known for their ability to regulate sebum production in the hair and scalp. The oil's anti-inflammatory properties help to soothe and calm irritated scalp conditions that can contribute to oily hair. The aloe-emodin in aloe barbadensis essential oils has been shown to reduce the activity of 5-alpha-reductase, an enzyme that converts testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormon...
